name: Excessive Failed Logins to Compliance IS
notes: Reports excessive authentication failures to a compliance server within 10 minutes.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures with the same destination IP more than 10 times
conditions_text: when we see an event match any of the following BB:ComplianceDefinition: GLBA Servers, BB:ComplianceDefinition: HIPAA Servers, BB:ComplianceDefinition: SOX Servers
when we see any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures with the same destination IP more than 10 times, across more than 0 destination IP(s) within 10 minutes
thresholds: when we see any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures with the same destination IP more than 10 times, across more than 0 destination IP(s) within 10 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Excessive Failed Logins to Compliance IS on events which are detected by the undefined system
AND when we see an event match any of the following BB:ComplianceDefinition: GLBA Servers, BB:ComplianceDefinition: HIPAA Servers, BB:ComplianceDefinition: SOX Servers
AND when we see any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures with the same destination IP more than 10 times, across more than 0 destination IP(s) within 10 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Excessive Failed Logins to Compliance IS
Event description: Detected excessive authentication failures to a compliance server within 10 minutes.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Destination IP
This information should not contribute to the naming of the associated offense(s)
